types: Account information (email, name, optional user details)
Learning activity data (videos watched, exercises completed, progress)
Device information (IP address, browser type, OS)
Optional: School/classroom information (if linked by teacher)

childrens_privacy.notes: Khan Academy complies with COPPA for children under 13. Parental consent required for accounts of children under 13. Platform specifically designed with FERPA and student privacy in mind.
childrens_privacy.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

gaps: AI training use not clearly stated
label_notes: Source: training knowledge — accessed 2026-03-20. Khan Academy is a non-profit educational organization with strong privacy focus. Minimal third-party sharing and no advertising use of learning data. COPPA and FERPA compliant. One of the most privacy-protective major learning platforms. Does not monetize student data. MFA not available is minor security gap. Learning data used for personalization and research, but not for commercial profiling or advertising.
